name: python3-pandas-lib
title: python3-pandas-lib
summary: low-level implementations and bindings for pandas
description:
low-level implementations and bindings for pandas
This is a low-level package for python3-pandas providing
architecture-dependent extensions.
.
Users should not need to install it directly.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pandas-lib because low-level implementations and bindings for pandas.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pandas-lib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pandas-lib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pandas-lib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
